title: Employer-supported digital borrower
processing_notes: In-scope participant with smartphone, bank account, employer support, and digital borrowing behavior.

title: Digitally ready but fearful
processing_notes: In-scope participant who uses WhatsApp and bank account but distrusts loan apps because of scams.

title: No smartphone override
processing_notes: Non-target because the participant explicitly says they use a basic phone.

title: No bank account override
processing_notes: Non-target because the participant explicitly states they do not have a bank account.

title: Self-reliant non-borrower
processing_notes: In-scope participant who prefers savings and avoids borrowing.

title: High-stress cyclical borrower
processing_notes: In-scope participant with repeated borrowing and repayment stress.

title: WhatsApp user with trust barrier
processing_notes: In-scope participant uses WhatsApp and UPI but distrusts unfamiliar lenders.

title: Employer-guided app user
processing_notes: In-scope participant has both prerequisites and relies on employer guidance for digital borrowing.

title: No smartphone and no bank account
processing_notes: Non-target because both prerequisites are absent.

title: Savings-first household planner
processing_notes: In-scope participant uses digital tools but still avoids borrowing because she prefers savings discipline.
